scenario: You are developing a model-driven application for CompanyA. The model-driven application will be integrated with several on-premises and cloud environments. As a Power Platform developer, you need to identify the method that should be used for each integration.
q: Match the appropriate method to each integration. Each method may be used once, more than once, or not at all.
rows: To make synchronous calls to third-party APIs.
To pass messages to and from a website hosted in Azure.
To perform real-time updates on data in Microsoft Dataverse.
why: Use WEBHOOKS to make synchronous calls to third-party APIs: webhooks let Dataverse send event data to custom code hosted on external services in real time (synchronously). Use AZURE SERVICE BUS to pass messages reliably to and from a website/line-of-business app hosted in Azure. Use PLUG-INS to perform real-time updates on data within Dataverse. Do not use a Power Automate flow - flows run asynchronously as background processes and are for connecting multiple data sources, not for synchronous API calls or real-time in-transaction updates.
